source.purpose: Two durable clues should activate an investigation synthesis packet with live hypotheses, open questions, contradictions, and next leads.

input.playerInput: Lay out the evidence before we move.

narrator.prose: The manifest gap and the disabled user account point at the same tampered freight transfer.

payload.title: Who altered the freight manifest?
payload.resolution_criteria: Identify who tampered with the freight transfer and why.
payload.failure_mode: The tampered transfer becomes actionable before Ren can expose it.
payload.retrieval_cue: Manifest gap and disabled user account point to altered freight transfer.

creates.source_quote: manifest gap and the disabled user account

payload.content: The freight manifest has a missing transfer number in the annex window.
payload.retrieval_cue: Freight manifest missing transfer number in annex window.

payload.content: The access log names a user account that was disabled before the transfer.
payload.retrieval_cue: Disabled user account appears in freight access log.

input.text: The access log names an impossible user.
The west stair is watched after vespers.
